creator: a@goldin.su
text:
Intel Tiger Lake Audio Card (Tiger Lake-LP Smart Sound Technology Audio Controller) not working. I tried all available ways to solve the problem.

Forum topic: https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/audio-card-intel-tiger-lake.96345/

The hardware configuration based on the hw-probe results is here:
https://bsd-hardware.info/?probe=434a020e3e

Best regards,
Alexander
